I build the plumbing behind reliable products.

Service-oriented backend systems

APIs, workers, database-backed workflows, and service boundaries for production financial-data products.

Idempotent job processing

Event-driven workers designed for duplicate messages, retries, delayed processing, graceful shutdown, dead-letter queues, and visible lag.

Open the backpressure playground

Recovery engineering and auditability

Point-in-time recovery, migration safety, field-level audit trails, distributed tracing, precision-critical components, and failure-first engineering habits.
